headline: Goldman Sachs Names The Progressive Corporation (PGR) among Appealing Insurance Investments
summary: The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) ranks among the 14 safe stocks to buy now for a starter stock portfolio. Goldman Sachs reaffirmed its buy rating and $225 price target for The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) on February 23 in response to the company’s January 2026 results. headline: Progressive CFO Transition Puts Focus On Valuation Gap And Earnings Outlook
summary: Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) announced that long-serving CFO John Sauerland will retire after a 35 year career with the company. Andrew Quigg has been named as Sauerland's successor, marking a planned transition in the insurer's senior leadership team. Progressive is a major U.S. auto and property insurer, so a change in the CFO seat is closely watched by investors who follow underwriting results, capital management, and claims trends. The insurance sector has been dealing with higher...
